nodes.itemHTML: • Beakerstars6.2k - Browser with peer-to-peer web protocols.

• Google I/O Transport Trackerstars526 - Shows shuttle arrival times for Google I/O conference, based on the open-source transport-tracker projectstars526. Note: To implement this yourself, you need a Google Maps APIs Premium Plan license.
• githubstars7.4k - Go library for accessing the GitHub REST API v3.
• githubqlstars776 - Go library for accessing the GitHub GraphQL API v4.
• drmaastars31 - Job submission library for cluster schedulers based on the DRMAA standard.
• IIPC Blog
• The Web as History - An open-source book that provides a conceptual overview to web archiving research, as well as several case studies.

• Introductions to web archiving concepts:
    • What is a web archive? - A video from the UK Web Archive YouTube Channel
    • Wikipedia's List of Web Archiving Initiatives
    • Glossary of Archive-It and Web Archiving Terms
    • The Web Archiving Lifecycle Model - The Web Archiving Lifecycle Model is an attempt to incorporate the technological and programmatic arms of the web archiving into a framework that will be relevant to any organization seeking to archive content from the web. Archive-It, the web archiving service from the Internet Archive, developed the model based on its work with memory institutions around the world.
    • Training materials: module for beginners (8 sessions)
• go-cleanarchstars451 - go-cleanarch was created to validate Clean Architecture rules, like a The Dependency Rule and interaction between packages in your Go projects.
• GoRouterstars92 - GoRouter is a Server/API micro framwework, HTTP request router, multiplexer, mux that provides request router with middleware supporting net/context.
• Qbserve - Automatic time and project tracking, timesheets, invoicing, and real-time productivity feedback.
• Timing - Automatic time and productivity tracking for Mac. Helps you stay on track with your work and ensures no billable hours get lost if you are billing hourly.
• IIPC
• Compiler Design in C (1990) - Allen Holub, Prentice Hall
• Compiling Techniques (1969) - F.R.A. Hopgood, Macdonald
• Core Servlets and JavaServer Pages, 2nd Ed. (2003) - Marty Hall and Larry Brown
• Java Application Development on Linux (2005) - Carl Albing and Michael Schwarz (PDF)
• Processing XML with Java (A Guide to SAX, DOM, JDOM, JAXP, and TrAX) (2002) - Elliotte Rusty Harold
• Welcome to the Java Workshop (2006) - Trevor Miller
• WinDebug - Windows ANE to control applications, windows, memory, breakpoints, metadata, registry, etc.
• MotionParticleSpritestars0 - Design motion paths in Flash Pro and use it to guide Starling particles.
• FLAC - Free Lossless Audio Coding, used by some broadcasters for audio exchange, storage.
• Turing Codec - An H.265/HEVC open source software encoder designed for fast and efficient video compression.
• dial-discovery-iosstars1 - A library for the discovery of devices via the DIAL protocol on the iOS platform.
• dvbcss-synctimingstars16 - A system for measuring how accurately a TV or companion are synchronised.
• DVB Inspector - An open-source DVB analyzer.
• DVBlast - A simple and powerful MPEG-2/TS demux and streaming application.
• dvbshoutstars7 - Tool to send DVB audio to a shoutcast server or a RTP stream.
• Opencaster - A free and open source MPEG2 transport stream data generator and packet manipulator.
• Aurenastars111 - A network distributed media playback system.
• CasparCG - A professional graphics and video play-out software, proven in 24/7 broadcasts since 2006.
• RadioVIS Html Playerstars13 - RadioVIS Player using WebSocket.
• EBUCorestars18 - The Github for maintenance of the EBUCore schema.
• TV-Anytimestars12 - The TV-Anytime schema github maintenance page.
• UPipestars0 - Primarily designed to be the core of a multimedia player, transcoder or streamer.
• FlashPunkstars377 - Framework to build 2D games. Provides graphics, events, inputs, animation, etc.
• Flixelstars1.1k - Useful base classes that you can extend to make your own game objects.

• Tetragonstars31 - Cross-platform framework to build any kind of game. Provides resource management, debugging facilities, multi-locale support, layered extendability, a game-oriented data structure, and more.
• Pixelizerstars53 - Component based game engine to build 2D games. Provides rendering, animation, input, etc.
• FZipstars179 - Mature library to load, modify and create standard ZIP archives.
• BlooddyCryptostars83 - High-performance library for processing binary data. This library contains MD5, SHA-1, SHA-2, Base64, CRC32, JSON, PNG/JPEG encoders.
• AS3corelibstars1.5k - MD5 and SHA1 hashing, Image encoders, and JSON serialization.
• ASCryptstars47 - Crypto library with a similar API for multiple languages.
• Nexuslibstars9 - Reflection, serialization, seeded random number generation, cryptography, networking, and more.
• Hashlibstars1 - Over 30 different hashing functions.
• XXTEA-AS3stars5 - XXTEA encryption algorithm library for ActionScript 3.
• Gibberish-AESstars1 - A fully OpenSSL compliant ActionScript 3 library for AES encryption.
• AS3Unitsstars1 - Port of NGUnits. Parsing, formatting, and converting between units of measure.
• Zexpressionstars10 - Parse and evalate math expressions with functions and variables.
• FlashFormulaEditorstars16 - Formula editor made in Adobe Flex.
• Linkify-as3stars9 - Convert URLs, e-mail addresses, phone numbers, into clickable links.
• AS3hyphenationstars1 - Port of the Javascript text hyphenation library Hyphenator.js.
• AS3FPstars12 - Collection of functional idioms based on Haskell and Coffeescript.
• Raixstars92 - Reactive And Interactive eXtensions simplifies working with interactive data (arrays) or reactive data (events).
• Fxp-as3stars3 - Functional library inspired by the "mostly adequate guide".
• AS3geometrystars76 - Primitives, Polygons, Intersections, etc.
• AS3GeomAlgostars41 - Collection of geometry algorithms. Port of hxGeomAlgo.
• PathUtilsstars4 - Working with quadratic, bezier and line sequences.
• Hilbertstars1 - Port of Hilbert curve from cortesi/scurve.
• AS3AStarstars21 - Fast A-Star pathfinding algorithm.
• A-star_pathfinderstars3 - A-Star pathfinding interface for tile based maps.
• As3Pathfinderstars15 - Grid Path finding Library written using Dijkstra's algorithm.
• AS3dpadstars17 - A virtual touchscreen gamepad designed for Adobe AIR Mobile (Android/iOS).
• Gamepadstars55 - Simulates an analog joystick input using the keyboard.
• Advanced_Joystickstars19 - Joystick for the Starling Framework, designed for Adobe AIR Mobile.
• AS3-Controller-Inputstars29 - Interact with Ouya and Xbox360 game controllers from Adobe AIR.
• RobotEyesstars50 - End-to-end testing for TDD. Hybrid of WindowLicker and Drew Bourne's Mockolate.
• EasyAGALstars118 - Simplifies development of AGAL shaders with code completion, code hinting, macros, etc.
• Lumostars1.8k – Fast, cross-platform, standalone ClojureScript environment.
• vertx-mysql-binlog-clientstars18 - A Vert.x client for tapping into MySQL replication stream.
